ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of mathematical model (e.g., exponential, logistic) */,
  "theta" REAL /* Theta parameter of the model */,
  "p" REAL /* P parameter of the model */,
  "s0" REAL /* S0 parameter of the model */,
  "sInf" REAL /* SInf parameter of the model */,
  "kappa" REAL /* Kappa parameter of the model */,
  "gamma" REAL /* Gamma parameter of the model */,
  "y0" REAL /* Y0 parameter of the model */,
  "yInf" REAL /* YInf parameter of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the model */,
  "fit_quality" REAL /* A metric to assess the goodness of fit (e.g., R-squared, RMSE) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking the model to the user who created it */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking the dataset to the user who uploaded it */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the uploaded dataset file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_fits" (
  "fit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fit */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking the fit to the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking the fit to the dataset */,
  "fit_quality" REAL /* A metric to assess the goodness of fit (e.g., R-squared, RMSE) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* JSON object containing the estimated parameters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fit was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the fit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fit_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "fit_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking the metric to the fit */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., R-squared, RMSE) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)
